title: Fermented Gooey Tofu Croquettes
description: These festive tofu croquettes are a traditional Croatian vegetarian dish that combines the soft and gooey texture of fermented tofu with a hint of dum flavor, perfect for any meal.
instructions: Mix the fermented tofu with flour and minced garlic in a bowl.
If using dum powder, add it to the mixture; otherwise, use your preferred seasoning for extra flavor.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or pan until hot (350°F/175°C).
Dip the mixture into water to form a dough-like consistency and shape into croquette-sized patties using your hands.
Gently place the croquettes into the hot oil and cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Drain excess oil and serve warm.
